title: ADR Consistency Rule Registry Schema
description: Schema for the ADR consistency rule registry consumed by the PowerShell validator. Each rule names a check function dispatched by the implementation to produce findings against ADR markdown under docs/planning/adrs/.

rules.description: Ordered list of consistency rules. The validator imports this array and dispatches to the named check function.

id.description: Stable rule identifier in the form ADR-CONSISTENCY-NNN (zero-padded three-digit suffix).

severity.description: Violation severity. 'error' fails the Govern exit gate; 'warn' surfaces a remediation hint without blocking.

scope.description: Region of the ADR document the check inspects.

check.description: Kebab-case name of the check function dispatched by the validator. Must resolve to a callable in PowerShell (Test-<PascalCase>).

message.description: Remediation-oriented message template surfaced to the author. May contain {placeholder} tokens substituted by the validator.

description.description: Optional human-readable summary of the invariant the rule enforces.
